message:
feat(plan): implement mission pause/resume/abort with checkpoint persistence

Add MissionOwnership::solo() constructor. Expand MISSION_LIFECYCLE_TRANSITIONS
to allow ExecutionBlocked from Dispatching/AwaitingApproval/Blocked/
RetryPending. Add pause_resume_state field to Mission with
MissionControlCommand, MissionCheckpoint, and MissionPauseResumeState
types. Rewrite pause_mission/resume_mission/abort_mission to create
and finalize checkpoints, track counters, snapshot assignments, and
cancel in-flight assignments on abort.

Enable proptest_pause_resume suite (swap feature gate from placeholder
to subprocess-bridge).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
